assertions.title: Divergence list panel visible within Chart tab

steps.expected: Page loads with Chart tab active
steps.observed: Page loaded, Chart tab active by default

steps.expected: Panel visible as sidebar or embedded list with heading
steps.observed: Divergence panel (id=divergence-panel, class=divergence-panel) visible on right side with heading 'Divergences', rect {left:1060, width:220, height:537}

steps.action: Verify panel does not occlude chart
steps.observed: Chart renders in remaining space to the left, panel positioned to the right, no occlusion

assertions.title: List populated from Schema 4C divergence_index (9832 entries expected)

steps.action: Check entry count in divergence list
steps.observed: div-entry-list contains exactly 9832 child elements (childCount: 9832)

steps.expected: Each entry is a div.div-entry with data-idx attribute
steps.observed: Entries are div.div-entry elements with sequential data-idx, first at idx=0, last shows 'Jan 12 16:35'

assertions.title: Each entry shows timestamp, primitive, TF, and config status

steps.expected: Each entry shows time, primitive, tf, and config status (A only/B only/Both)
steps.observed: Each entry has: .div-entry-time (e.g. 'Jan 7 19:00'), .div-entry-prim (e.g. 'Asia Range'), .div-entry-tf (e.g. 'global', '15m'), .div-entry-status (e.g. 'Both', 'A only', 'B only')

steps.expected: All four fields visible on multiple entries
steps.observed: Sampled entries at indices 0,1,2,50,100 — all have time, primitive, tf, status fields populated correctly

assertions.title: Click entry scrolls chart to that timestamp

steps.observed: Chart shows Tue Jan 9 data (default day)
Chart scrolled and time axis changed to show the 17:00-01:00 range for Jan 8. Day tab switched to Tue Jan 9 and divergence list scrolled to show Jan 8 entries. Chart updated within 500ms

steps.action: Verify chart shows data near the clicked timestamp
steps.observed: Chart time axis shows data in the correct time range for the clicked entry
Dropdown selected 'Displacement', list filtered to 5247 visible entries, all verified as 'Displacement' primitive
Count summary updated to 'Total: 5247, A only: 0, B only: 0'
Selecting 'All' restored 9832 visible entries with original counts (Total: 9832, A only: 55, B only: 265)

steps.expected: Shows total divergences, only_in_a count, only_in_b count
steps.observed: div-count-summary element displays: 'Total: 9832', 'A only: 55', 'B only: 265'. Three separate div-count-item elements with distinct classes (div-count-total, div-count-a, div-count-b)
When filtered by Displacement: 'Total: 5247, A only: 0, B only: 0'. When filtered by Asia session: 'Total: 3043, A only: 12, B only: 73'
A only entry (idx 7865, Mss 15m): borderLeftColor = rgb(38, 166, 154) = #26a69a, statusColor = rgb(38, 166, 154) — teal/Config A color
B only entry (idx 7753, Liquidity Sweep 15m): borderLeftColor = rgb(247, 197, 72) = #f7c548, statusColor = rgb(247, 197, 72) — amber/Config B color
Both entries (idx 0-4): borderLeftColor = rgb(120, 123, 134) = ~#787b86, statusColor = rgb(120, 123, 134) — muted/neutral color matching --muted design token
div-entry-list has overflowY: 'auto', scrollHeight: 412944px, clientHeight: 386px — highly scrollable

steps.expected: List scrolls and shows different entries
steps.observed: Set scrollTop from 0 to 2000 — worked, different entries visible after scroll. Chart remains fully visible alongside.

steps.action: Verify chart not affected by list scroll
steps.observed: Chart fully visible, list scrolling is independent

steps.action: Verify session filter dropdown exists with options
steps.expected: Session filter with Asia, LOKZ, NYOKZ, Other options
steps.observed: Session combobox present with options: All, Asia, LOKZ, NYOKZ, Other

steps.expected: List filters to Asia session entries only
steps.observed: Selecting 'Asia' filtered list to 3043 entries. Count summary updated to 'Total: 3043, A only: 12, B only: 73'. Sample entries show Asia-session times (19:00)
Selecting 'All' restored 9832 entries with original counts

assertions.title: Divergence navigator click scrolls chart to detection (A only entry)

steps.action: Find and click first 'A only' divergence entry
steps.expected: Entry with in_a=true, in_b=false found and clicked
steps.observed: Clicked entry at idx 7865: 'Jan 10 01:45, Mss, 15m, A only' — teal colored status indicating Config A detection

steps.expected: Chart time scale centers on entry's timestamp
steps.observed: Chart scrolled to show the Jan 10 time area. Chart zoomed/panned to the detection region

steps.expected: Config A marker visible at detection point
steps.observed: Teal up-arrow marker (Config A / candidate_relaxed) visible on the chart at the scrolled-to position

steps.expected: No Config B marker at same point
steps.observed: No amber/Config B marker at the same timestamp — consistent with 'A only' divergence status

summary: Tested 10 assertions: all 10 passed. Divergence navigator panel is visible on Chart tab with 9832 entries, correct count summary, color coding by type (teal for A only, amber for B only, muted for Both), click-to-scroll working, primitive and session filters functioning correctly with count updates, list scrollable with overflow-y auto, and cross-area click-scroll-to-detection verified with Config A marker present and Config B absent for A-only entry. Zero console errors throughout testing.
